programs.programName: Medicaid for the Aged, Blind, or Disabled (ABD)

verified.notes: Asset limits not found in provided sources; income limits from official 2026 Ohio Medicaid PDF tied to SSI rates

programs.notes: Asset limits not found in provided sources; income limits from official 2026 Ohio Medicaid PDF tied to SSI rates

verified.notes: Program is active as of April 2026. Income limits exist but are complex (based on Medicaid eligibility and spousal allowances); specific dollar amounts not provided in retrieved sources. Asset limits are current as of 2025 per medicaidplanningassistance.org. Phone number is toll-free for PASSPORT inquiries per official state notices.

verified.notes: No income or asset limits; eligibility based on care recipient age 60+ needing help with 2+ ADLs per COAAA (2025 source citing program details). Phone from official Ohio Dept of Aging site.

programs.notes: No income or asset limits; eligibility based on care recipient age 60+ needing help with 2+ ADLs per COAAA (2025 source citing program details). Phone from official Ohio Dept of Aging site.

verified.notes: Age requirement (55+) confirmed from Ohio Department of Aging official source. Income eligibility exists (125% federal poverty level per DOL) but specific dollar thresholds vary by family size and are not provided in search results. No single official main phone number found; Ohio has multiple regional SCSEP provider offices with different numbers. Assets limits not specified in available sources. Program remains active as of 2026 with current funding.
